log_summary: Python syntax validation passed for workspace/patch/custom-callback-norm-lr-01/norm_lr_logger.py. Manual inspection confirmed the MindFormerRegister callback registration, MFTrainOneStepCell output indices, JSONL append behavior, step-zero guard, OSError guard, and YAML config fragment. The artifact protocol validator passed for both workspace artifacts and the evidence-backed learning record. Runtime execution on Ascend hardware was not performed in this sample cycle.
success_pattern: Use MFTrainOneStepCell net_outputs[3] as the primary current-step learning-rate source, with optimizer.get_lr() as fallback, and use net_outputs[4] for global_norm when runner_wrapper.use_clip_grad is true. Guard logging so failures record null or warnings instead of interrupting training.

findings.detail: @MindFormerRegister.register(MindFormerModuleType.CALLBACK) usage is present and matches wiki guidance in api/mindformer-register.
LR extraction uses net_outputs[3] and global_norm extraction uses net_outputs[4], matching the MFTrainOneStepCell layout recorded in api/mf-train-wrappers.
The final artifact has step == 0 guard and OSError handling around append-mode JSONL writes.

tools/validate_task_artifacts.py passed with --require-learning, proving the sample artifact chain cites task contract, candidate ledger, evidence, verify result, promotion decision, and learning record.
